captures.evidence: ctx.t.states.sensorUnavailable resolves to DE string when hass.locale.language === 'de'
ctx.t.states.sensorUnavailable resolves to EN string when hass.locale.language === 'en'

functional_proof.notes: Mock-Configs nutzen alle YAML-name-Overrides für Knoten (Solar Dach, Dach-Speicher etc.) — diese bleiben sprachunabhängig (Renderer-Fallback entry.name ?? ctx.t.nodes.*). Sprach-Differentiation wird über sprachneutrale Renderer-Stellen sichtbar (sensorUnavailable, diagnostics, stubHint, narrowBanner).
